input.command: curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/base-org/brand-kit/contents/" | python3 -c "import sys, json; files = json.load(sys.stdin); print('\n'.join([f['name'] for f in files]))" 2>/dev/null || echo "Checking Base brand assets..."
